subcodes.title: Ay Bulbulan
subcodes.first_line: It is the season of the rose, O nightingales, O nightingales! O mystic knowers of the Lord, The Unseen threw aside His veils!
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بلبلان ای بلبلان فصل گل و  گلذار  شد ای عارفان ای عارفان آنغیب در اظهار
subcodes.subjects: @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @mystical themes, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @poems and quotation from poetry, @love of God, @transcending the material condition
